description: Order history sorting by date and total amount
acceptance_criteria: Log in with valid customer credentials from seed data.
Locate the sort dropdown with data-testid='order-sort'.
Select 'Date (Newest)' option and verify orders display in descending created_at order.
Select 'Date (Oldest)' option and verify orders display in ascending created_at order.
Select 'Total (High-Low)' and verify orders sort by total_amount descending.
Select 'Total (Low-High)' and verify orders sort by total_amount ascending.
Verify sorting happens without page reload (no full refresh).
Verify sort selection persists during session using data-testid='sort-active' indicator.
